clEntries.5.11.166: v5.11.165: Fixed synchronization of energy scaling UI components across smart plugs., Added missing `button.push` capability to Fingerbot to resolve issue #162., Enhanced Tuya WiFi pairing with local QR code generation, improving compatibility with PC Web App., Implemented robust cloudless discovery fallback and protocol auto-rotation for better device connectivity.
